name: AORTOPULMONIC WINDOW
definition: AORTOPULMONARY WINDOW large round / oval communication between left wall of ascending aorta + right wall of proximal communication near semilunar valves (70-96%) distal communication near pulmonary bifurcation at level of right pulmonary artery total absence of aortopulmonary septum (5%)

demographics.Associated with: other congenital cardiac anomalies (in up to 44%)

discriminating_features: defect several mm above aortic valve

CXR: defect several mm above aortic valve
pulmonary valve identified (DDx to truncus arteriosus)

clinical.Rx: surgery (pulmonary artery flap, pericardial patch); nonsurgical (Amplatzer device
